title: Some of the Sources of [the Report that He Was Fifty-Five Years Old
description: Some of the Sources of [the Report that He Was Fifty-Five Years Old. Recorded under the year 22 AH (643–644 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 14.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 14
